Table 2: The sensitivity/specificity of each tumor marker for HCC was depicted.
Sensitivity Specificity OR PPV/NPV Cut-off point
The sensitivity/specificity values are 90.2%/85.4% for hTERTmRNA, 76.6%/66.2% for AFP, 60.5%/88.7% for AFP-L3, and 83.4%/80.3% for DCP.
Regarding a diagnostic assessment in sensitivity and specificity, hTERTmRNA is identified as the most excellent tumor marker. OR: odds ratio,
PPV: positive predictive value (%), NPV: negative predictive value (%).
